query: Google Cloud Next 2026 networking announcements preview April 2026

key_facts: Google Cloud Next 2026 takes place April 22-24, 2026 at Mandalay Bay Convention Center, Las Vegas, with 30,000+ expected attendees
Four dedicated networking breakout sessions confirmed: network security, AI inference networking, cross-cloud networking, and agentic cross-cloud networking
Session BRK1-102 'What's New in Network Security' (Day 1) will unveil new AI-powered policy generation, recommendation, and simulation capability for Cloud NGFW, DNS Armor, and Cloud Armor
Session BRK3-039 'Improve AI Developer Velocity with an Agentic Cross-Cloud Network' (Day 3) introduces new service-networking capabilities for GKE and Cloud Run designed for agentic AI
Cloud NGFW URL filtering with domain/wildcard and SNI filtering announced April 8, 2026 — enables L7 inspection without TLS decryption
Multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway entered preview March 17, 2026, enabling cross-region AI inference load balancing across multiple GKE clusters
Envoy is positioned as foundational data plane for agentic AI networking with MCP deframing extensions, A2A protocol support, and stateful session management
Google disclosed it needs approximately 15,000 300-port OCS (Optical Circuit Switching) switches in 2026, with ~12,000 designed internally and manufactured by Celestica
Anthropic secured ~3.5 GW of next-generation TPU capacity from Google (via Broadcom), expected online starting 2027
AWS-Google Cloud multicloud networking partnership is in preview since late 2025, with Azure expected to join in 2026
Google's Autonomous Network Operations framework announced at MWC 2026 includes Network Digital Twin, Graph Neural Networks, and new autonomous Telco Agents
At Next '25, key networking baselines were established: 400G interconnects, 30,000 GPU cluster support, GKE Inference Gateway (30% cost reduction), Cloud WAN (40% TCO savings)
Google's first-party model API consumes over 10 billion tokens per minute, driving massive networking infrastructure demand
120,000+ enterprises using Gemini model by end of 2025, with 8M+ paid Gemini Enterprise seats
The overarching networking theme at Next 2026 is 'agentic networking' — making networks invisible, agile, and secure for AI agent workloads
